title: emplace and bitset _M_getdata private member error
body:
Any ideas on this? Looks like <bitset> issue compiling with clang/AL2/Graviton3/aarch64

```
../V3FileLine.cpp:114:43: note: in instantiation of function template specialization 'std::__debug::unordered_map<std::__debug::bitset<129>, unsigned short, std::hash<std::__debug::bitset<129>>, std::equal_to<std::__debug::bitset<129>>, std::allocator<std::pair<const std::__debug::bitset<129>, unsigned short>>>::emplace<const std::__debug::bitset<129> &, int>' requested here
    const auto pair = m_internedMsgEnIdxs.emplace(bitSet, 0);
                                          ^
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:748:7: note: constrained by private inheritance here
    : private _Base_bitset<_GLIBCXX_BITSET_WORDS(_Nb)>
      ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:120:7: note: member is declared here
      _M_getdata() const noexcept
      ^
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:1568:31: error: cannot cast 'const __cxx1998::bitset<129UL>' to its private base class 'const std::__cxx1998::_Base_bitset<3>'
        return std::_Hash_impl::hash(__b._M_getdata(), __clength);
                                     ^
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:748:7: note: declared private here
    : private _Base_bitset<_GLIBCXX_BITSET_WORDS(_Nb)>

```
code_blocks:

    const auto pair = m_internedMsgEnIdxs.emplace(bitSet, 0);
                                          ^

    : private _Base_bitset<_GLIBCXX_BITSET_WORDS(_Nb)>
      ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:120:7: note: member is declared here
      _M_getdata() const noexcept
      ^
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:1568:31: error: cannot cast 'const __cxx1998::bitset<129UL>' to its private base class 'const std::__cxx1998::_Base_bitset<3>'
        return std::_Hash_impl::hash(__b._M_getdata(), __clength);
                                     ^
/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-redhat-linux/7/../../../../include/c++/7/bitset:748:7: note: declared private here
    : private _Base_bitset<_GLIBCXX_BITSET_WORDS(_Nb)>
